title: Finite Proof Method Patterns

solver_reuse.pressure: Tiny propositional contradiction where p, p -> q, and not q cannot be jointly satisfied.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional proof-method rows only when they add distinct Boolean proof-pattern pressure; keep general natural-deduction soundness in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Replay finite proof-pattern witnesses and counterexamples from raw Boolean assignments.
Enumerate truth tables for no-counterexample proof obligations.
Keep invalid proof moves represented as satisfying counterexamples, not informal warnings.
Keep the resource-backed contradiction CNF regression checking generated DRAT and elaborated LRAT proofs.
Promote to proof-object evidence only after LRAT/Alethe/Lean artifacts check the same proof patterns.
